problem: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants?
mechanism: Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering
hypothesis: If Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering is applied to formation, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 25 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
